title: Bubsy's Block Party
description: Just a fun little collection of mods aimed at going "one step" past the Vanilla+ experience. Players can engage with the new mechanics added by Create, Tetra, Botania, and MCA:Reborn (to name a few) or play a vanilla game with a fresh coat of paint.
body:
Bubsy's Block Party is a small modpack for my friends on my SMP server.

Players will be able to explore a new-yet-familiar overworld created with Lithosphere and William Wyther's Overhauled Overworld, populated with structures and features from several popular structure mods like Dungeons n' Taverns, Towns and Towers, and YUNG's mods. They will then be able to interact with the world using  new mechanics added by Create, Tetra, Minecraft Comes Alive, Spelunkery, Botania, and Hexcasting (to name just a few). 

The overall goal of this project is to enable players to enhance their Minecraft experience with new mechanics if they wish while still staying true to what I feel is the heart or spirit of Minecraft. As many of the new mechanics as possible are optional, so players who want to just play the game they already know with a few new blocks are also free to do so.
